76381.subject: The Ultimate Guide to Kimi K3 🤖
76381.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/kimi-k3-ultimate-guide

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 397k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
Last month, GLM-5.2 [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] delivered the ChatGPT moment for local AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]: the first open-weight model good enough to be a daily driver on your own hardware. Yet, it left one question hanging: what happens when an open lab stops merely catching up to the closed frontier and starts beating it? 🤔
Kimi K3 is the answer.
Released on July 16 by Moonshot AI, the Beijing lab behind the Kimi assistant, K3 is a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight flagship: the largest ever released, with a 1,048,576-token context window that swallows entire codebases and data rooms in one pass, native image and video understanding, and always-on reasoning.
Kimi K3 vs. Claude Fable 5. Credit: @shiri_shh via X
In its first week, independent testing produced results no open model has ever posted:
#1 in the world for frontend coding: 1,679 Elo on Arena, ahead of Claude Fable 5 (1,631) and GPT-5.6 Sol (1,618) in blind human voting (Arena)
#1 on confirmed task success across 8,000+ live agentic sessions (Arena Agent)
#1 in 3D design, 82 Elo ahead of second-place Fable 5 (Design Arena)
#2 in the world on agentic knowledge work, the spreadsheets-memos-presentations grind that fills every analyst’s week, ahead of GPT-5.6 Sol, Sonnet 5, and Opus 4.8 (Artificial Analysis)
Tied GPT-5.6 for the highest score ever recorded on CVE detection, at a fraction of the cost (Aikido)
#3 on the Intelligence Index, the highest placement an open-weight model has ever managed (Artificial Analysis)
All of that at roughly one-third of the price. Together AI’s engineering teardown found Fable 5-level software-engineering performance at ~35% of the cost, and Moonshot says the weights go up for free download on July 27.
Credit: Command Code via X
One caveat before the hype takes over. Like GLM-5.2’s maker ZAI, Moonshot is a Beijing-based lab, and the same sovereignty considerations flagged in the GLM-5.2 deep dive [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] apply here: open weights mitigate some of that risk; the hosted API does not.
But the model is only half the story, because K3 is also the least forgiving frontier model on the market: a long-horizon work engine, not a chatbot. Deliberately slow, reasoning at maximum effort by default, and dramatically better (and 10x cheaper, via cache discounts) the longer and more context

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.
